case_title: DANIEL GOLDBERG VS. EXPRESS MESSENGER SYSTMES INC. DBA ONTRAC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDBERG, DANIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EXPRESS MESSENGER SYSTEMS INC. DBA ONTRAC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GOLDBERG, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT EXPRESS MESSENGER SYSTEMS INC. DBA ONTRAC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GOLDBERG, DANIEL ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPRESS MESSENGER SYSTEMS INC. DBA ONTRAC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL GOLDBERG. DEFENDANT EXPRESS MESSENGER SYSTEMS INC.DBA ONTRAC IS PRESENT REPRESENED BY DEBORAH STEVENS, VP. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
